questions.question: Which sweetener, first used in 1879, has received FDA approval for use in fruit juice beverages?
Where is the headquarters of the North Western Railway zone located?
In which of the following years did Vodafone start its journey in India?
Decathlon, which set up its first outlet in India in Bengaluru in 2009, is a ___________.
Which of the following correctly pairs the abbreviation with its full form and primary function?
questions.option_1: ASCII – American Standard Communication for Input and Interface – Used for graphic design
questions.option_2: LAN – Local Area Network – Connects computers within a limited area
questions.option_3: ASCII – Advanced System for Communication Interface – Used in LAN setup
questions.option_4: CD – Central Disc – Stores operating system permanently

questions.question: Ikea, which received the government approval for its ₹10,500 crore FDI proposal in 2013 to set up 10 stores with allied infrastructure over 10 years, is a ____________.
Which public sector organisation is the largest provider of surface transport services in India?
Identify the language which is primarily spoken in the state of Mizoram in India from the options below.
Which of these is a part of solid waste management infrastructure?
What was the life expectancy in India in 1947?
In which of the following cities of India was Infosys established in 1994?
Which of the following abbreviations is correctly matched with its meaning?
questions.option_1: ASCII – Automated System for Computer Input

questions.question: Who among the following is regarded as the father of modern Hindi literature and theatre?
Which of the following is the official language of the state of Manipur?
Which company became the first in India to develop steel pipes for hydrogen transportation?
In Jain religion, the Svetarnbara canon consists of how many of Agamas?
Identify the correct combination of the abbreviation, its full form and its application.
questions.option_1: ASCII – American Standard Code for Information Interchange – Encodes text in computers
questions.option_2: CD – Compact Disk – Used for high-speed internet access
questions.option_3: LAN – Large Area Network – Used for connecting computers across continents
questions.option_4: ASCII – Automated Symbolic Code for Integrated Input – Converts images to code

questions.question: Each modern industrialised country, including India, has a National Metrology Institute (NMI). What is the main role of an NMI?
questions.option_1: To regulate internet access in the country

questions.question: Which of the following DOES NOT produce Greenhouse gases?
Which of the following organisations is tasked with providing certification to films before their public release in India?
questions.option_2: Film and Television Institute of India

questions.question: In which year was India’s first operational six-lane expressway, the approximately 95 km long Mumbai–Pune Expressway, inaugurated?
Urban transport infrastructure generally refers to the systems that facilitate the movement of people and goods within a city. Which of the following is NOT a part of urban transport infrastructure?
What is the most direct impact of poor infrastructure on rural education?
Which State launched India' first PPP green waste processing plant?

Which of the following, set up in June 1986, is responsible for the management of civil aerodromes and civil enclaves as well as for maintenance and operation of aeronautical communication systems at all the airports?
Which of the following Indian languages is spoken mainly in the state of Odisha?
Which of the following energy sources remained the dominant contributor to India’s renewable energy growth, accounting for 47% of the total installed renewable energy capacity in 2024?
In India, Red Bull India Private Limited (RBIL) has imported and sold Red Bull Energy Drink and its variants since _______.
Which one of the following Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) aims to ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy for all?
In which of the following years was Amazon.in launched in India?
Providing immediate assistance during a disaster is classified under which stage of disaster management?
